title: Digital: Mobile App Pages (read-only tour)

preflight.note: off-camera: stage the shared persisted sidebar-panel preference expanded so the MOBILE group reads with labels (steps 1, 13, 14 read the five entries; steps 7/9/10 click Mobile App Branding/Features and Push Notifications by label). .wc-rail-panel-toggle is the same control both ways (probe-verified July 11: collapsed reads 'Show panel' at aside width 1; expanded reads 'Hide panel' at aside width 220 with the five MOBILE links at x102 w203). Probe-verified the expanded preference PERSISTS across every Digital<->Settings navigation in this lesson (aside stayed 220+, 5 labeled group links on every Digital-shell page). Skipped when already expanded.

ops.note: pre-roll: start page staged on Mobile App Users (startUrl mobile-users.html; the Digital module's MOBILE group)
pre-roll: preflight left the sidebar panel expanded; abort the take if collapsed
pre-roll load check: 4 KPI tiles, 3 insight cards, 4 user rows, Notifications column, '4 records', no agent-service error
mutation guardrail (steps 1-6): Mobile App Users holds 4 rows and '4 records' with the panel expanded — proves no user record was created, edited, or deleted and nothing was clicked on the list
mutation guardrail (steps 7-8): Mobile App Branding stays '● Loaded' (never Saving/Published) — proves Save & Publish was never pressed and no field was edited
mutation guardrail (step 9): Mobile App Features holds its six game toggles and never enters Saving/Published — proves no toggle was flipped and Save & Publish was never pressed

mutation guardrail (steps 10-14): the Push Notification List holds '3 records' with the MOBILE group visible — proves no campaign was created or sent, Mobile Feedback was never opened, and the panel held expanded through the recap

step 5 (p20): 'Notifications, on or off, tells you why a customer swears the alert never came' — Lisa Park's row reads Off
step 5 (p21): 'Start here, before you touch anything else' — back to the two troubleshooting columns
step 6 (p22): 'Above the table, the usual controls'

step 6 (p24) guardrail: + New Record opens a blank create form — red do-not-click ring, never pressed
step 6 (p25): 'Leave both alone today; reading the list is all a technician needs'

step 7 (p27): click Mobile App Branding — VERIFIED PURE NAVIGATION (plain <a href="settings-mobile-branding.html">; probe-confirmed it loads the Branding page in the Settings shell, no mutation). Press lands in the 0.43s gap after 'Open Mobile App Branding' (ends ~90.98) so the Settings shell is up when p28 'Notice the shell flips to Settings' plays at ~91.4
cover the branding navigation with a stable-destination freeze (QA 24)
step 7 (p28): 'Notice the shell flips to Settings' — the Mobile App Branding title with the Mobile tag

brand,

step 9 (p36): click Close Settings — VERIFIED PURE NAVIGATION (returns to the Digital shell on mobile-users.html with the MOBILE group visible; probe-confirmed, no mutation). Press inside 'Back to the group,' (ends ~119.23) so the group is back before 'open Mobile App Features'
cover the Close-Settings navigation freeze (QA 24)
step 9 (p36 tail): 'open Mobile App Features' — hover the Mobile App Features link

step 9 (p36 tail): click Mobile App Features — VERIFIED PURE NAVIGATION (plain <a href="settings-mobile-features.html">; Settings shell, no mutation). Press near the end of 'open Mobile App Features' (~121.26) so Features is up before 'These are on-and-off switches' at ~121.69
cover the Features navigation freeze (QA 24)
step 9 (p37): 'on-and-off switches for the fun: daily spin, wash streak, scratch cards, a few more' — the Games list
step 9 (p37): sweep down the game rows

step 9 (p40 tail): hold beside the toggle column — nothing is flipped
step 10 (p41): 'Last page,' — hover Close Settings to leave the Features settings

step 10 (p41): click Close Settings — VERIFIED PURE NAVIGATION (returns to mobile-users, MOBILE group visible; no mutation). Press inside 'Last page,' (ends ~134.68) so the group is back for the Push Notifications click
cover the Close-Settings navigation freeze (QA 24)
step 10 (p41 tail): 'Push Notifications' — hover the Push Notifications link in the MOBILE group

step 10 (p41 tail): click Push Notifications — VERIFIED PURE NAVIGATION (plain <a href="mobile-push.html">; probe-confirmed it opens the Push Notification List in the Digital shell, no mutation). RESIDUAL R1: this group link now opens a push-campaign LIST/analytics page, not the 'Push Campaigns' composer the July-9 narration describes (see report). Press near the end of 'Push Notifications' (~136.29) so the page is up before 'It opens as Push Campaigns' at ~136.81
cover the Push Notifications navigation freeze (QA 24)
step 10 (p42): 'It opens as Push Campaigns: write a message, pick an audience' — the Push Notification List header (see RESIDUAL R1)
step 10 (p44) guardrail: 'That's marketing's job, not ours' — + New Record is where a campaign is composed/created; pointed at from beside with the red do-not-click ring
step 10 (p45) guardrail: 'We create no campaign here, and we send nothing' — Export stays untouched (red do-not-click ring); nothing is created or sent

step 11 (p46-p47): 'One thing ties these pages together. Each shows a live preview beside the settings' — the LIVE PREVIEW phones were shown on Branding and Features (steps 7, 9); on this push list the customer-facing view is the By Audience / Campaign Status panels (see RESIDUAL R1: the current push list page carries no in-page preview panel)
step 11 (p48): 'so you can see what the customer sees without leaving the console'
step 11 (p49): 'A standalone preview launcher isn't in this build, so we've parked it' — ease off (matches the parked launcher)

step 12 (p50): 'Click Close Settings' — RESIDUAL R2: in the current build Push Notifications is a Digital-shell page, so there is no Settings menu open to close; we are already back on the platform. The cursor eases toward the MOBILE group in the sidebar (the platform), and NOTHING is clicked. Nothing was saved, published, or sent.
step 12 (p51): 'The menu folds away and drops you back on the platform' — the Digital platform with the MOBILE group is already showing
step 12 (p52): 'with nothing saved, nothing published, and nothing sent' — ease onto the page
step 13 (p53): 'One entry stays closed: Mobile Feedback' — approach beside the Mobile Feedback entry

step 13 (p54): 'It's listed in the group, but the page didn't load in our capture' — held BESIDE the entry, never clicked. RESIDUAL R3: the page now DOES load in the current build; per the locked narration the entry stays closed, so it is not opened
step 13 (p55): 'Until someone walks it live, treat what's inside as unconfirmed' — hold beside the entry
step 14 (p56): 'That's the mobile corner of Digital' — begin the recap sweep from the bottom of the MOBILE group
step 14 (p57): 'One page you open on real calls, Mobile App Users'
step 14 (p58): 'and three you'll recognize but leave alone' — sweep up across Branding, Features, Push
step 14 (p58): the three configuration entries
step 14 (p59): 'When a customer's app misbehaves, you already know the first two columns to read' — rest beside Mobile App Users
step 14 (p59 tail): final park, clear of content and the burned captions, as the completion card lands
end state: still on the Push Notification List (Digital shell), unchanged
end state: push list intact — 3 records, MOBILE group visible; nothing was created, sent, saved, published, exported, or deleted anywhere in the walk
